positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a mystical forest scene under a crescent moon. The composition is highly central, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora, interconnected root systems, and silhouetted, ethereal woodland creatures (such as hummingbirds and deer) arranged in a circular composition. The artwork should use strong, crisp linework, thick outlines, and high contrast. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo blues, vibrant emerald greens, creamy off-whites, and accents of shimmering gold foil texture. The overall aesthetic is inspired by sacred geometry, vintage tattoo flash art, and Pacific Northwest illustrative style. Intricate details are required, suitable for a clean, single-color or limited-palette screen print on apparel. The style must be graphic and vector-like, perfect for merchandise printing.
